info.title: FluentCart API
info.description: Complete REST API documentation for FluentCart e-commerce platform

get.description: Search for published products by title and return server-rendered HTML search result items. Designed for use with the storefront search bar component.

parameters.name: post_title
parameters.description: The search query string to match against product titles

parameters.name: url_mode
parameters.description: URL mode passed to the SearchBarRenderer to control how product links are generated

parameters.name: termId
parameters.description: Filter search results to products within a specific taxonomy term (category) ID

htmlView.description: Pre-rendered HTML for direct insertion into the search results dropdown

ApplicationPasswords.name: Authorization
ApplicationPasswords.description: WordPress Application Passwords — use Basic auth with your WordPress username and an application password in the format: username:application_password
